local _k = 122
local _env = getfenv()
local _char = _env['string']['char']
local _concat = _env['table']['concat']
local _load = _env['loadstring'] or _env['load']
local _bxor = _env['bit32'] and _env['bit32']['bxor']

if not _load or _env['print'] == _load or _env['rconsoleprint'] == _load then
    while true do end
end

local _str_load = tostring(_load)
if _str_load:find("print") or _str_load:find("custom") or _str_load:find("hook") then
    while true do end
end

local _stream = {}
local _idx = 1
for i = 1, #_chunks do
    local _c = _chunks[i]
    for j = 1, #_c do
        _stream[_idx] = _char(_bxor(_c[j], _k))
        _idx = _idx + 1
    end
end

local _script = _concat(_stream)
assert(_load(_script))()
